title: HEALTH CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: FAMILY HEALTH ASSOCIATES UMATILLA CLINIC HEALTH CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides patient centered health care for children and adults. Services include annual exams, care for acute and chronic conditions, pregnancy testing, immunizations, sports physicals, concussion testing and monitoring, mental health evaluation, and health screenings. 1890 7th Street Umatilla, OR 97882 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site (541) 567-6434 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 567-6434 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information and to schedule an appointment FEES: OHP Eastern Oregon CCO, Medicare, Medical Home, and most private insurance. Offers payment plans for those paying out of pocket. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Morrow and Umatilla Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located behind the Umatilla post office and Mobil station and Subway Services: Childhood Immunization General Medical Care Mental Health Evaluation Private Clinics Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FAMILY HEALTH ASSOCIATES UMATILLA CLINIC
